title: Product Brief: The Librarian
verdict_summary: Live product brief, NOT superseded/stub — but it is explicitly an upstream build/alignment doc that 'references the existing PRD, it does not restate it' and whose 11 Resolved Decisions + 'Remaining for PRD/Architecture' are execution detail, not open product choices. It carries NO formal requirement IDs of its own; every obligation is downstreamed into the orvex-studio-staging PRD (mOzNDhn322, FR-STG1..29 + NFR-STG1..6) plus supporting PRDs, all of which are comprehensively covered. Coverage confirmed story-by-story: the Librarian engine/ritual/router/dial/dedup/learning/maintenance = orvex-studio-staging package (24 stories, E1-E8, all FR-STG ids in plan.json); layered capture + user-pull floor ('save-this-thread', beads capture edge) = ai E7-S3/E7-S4; card contract (engineGate Card Contract v1) = api E5 + staging Curator supersession; per-credential trust dial = staging E4 (Autonomy Dial + Trust Tiers); credential lifecycle issue/revoke = mcp/identity token management + ui E7-S2 (Connections & MCP setup); Memory full-CRUD + reversibility (bi-temporal, item history/restore) = api E3/E5; Docmost archive/restore/purge = api E5-S3/E6 + FR-40 page-lifecycle + purge stories; sensitivity gating (AI + user-taught, fail-safe) = api E5 + ui E5-S2; bounded-op/fail-fast/no-hang = mcp E1-S4 + staging quota/admission; Intake recurrence/bounding (ChangeSet expiry, depth/age admission, staleness sweep) = staging E2 + E7. Definition-phase obligations (engine spike, card-contract schema freeze) are covered by the staging definition pack (ENG-2094). Zero uncovered BUILD gaps.

components.name: The Librarian (curation engine)
components.quote: The Librarian turns that firehose into a tidy, deduplicated, self-maintaining personal knowledge base inside Orvex AI Studio

components.name: The Intake (staging change queue)
components.quote: Intake — the staging change queue. Cards land append-only, not in the wiki, staging every change (add, edit, delete-request).

components.name: MCP save-tool (narrow capture door)
components.quote: outside-in capture rides a narrow MCP (one safe save door, client-agnostic)

components.name: Per-credential trust dial + credential lifecycle
components.quote: per-credential trust dial + credential lifecycle (issue/revoke + permanent + inactivity-timeout)

components.name: The shelves / router (Wiki + Memory full-CRUD + Trash)
Emergent IA engine (productised doc-amend, link-preserving)
components.quote: Productise doc-amend, gated by a spike. Structure is emergent/learned, never templated; the Librarian evolves the IA (propose-confirm, link-preserving).

components.name: Sensitivity classifier (AI-classified + user-taught, fail-safe)
components.quote: AI-classified + user-taught, fail-safe ("when in doubt, gate"); learns from corrections.
